name: GammaScalpingStrategy
description: Long gamma / delta-neutral options strategy that buys ATM straddles when IV is cheap relative to realised vol, then repeatedly delta-hedges back to neutral as the underlying moves to extract gamma scalp profits. Exits on IV expansion (vega take-profit), IV contraction (vega stop), theta bleed limit, scalp profit target, or maximum hold period.

ivEntryMax.description: Maximum IV allowed at straddle entry; above this, straddles are too expensive

ivEntryMin.description: Minimum IV at entry; below this, gamma opportunity is insufficient

ivToHvRatioMin.description: Minimum HV/IV ratio required for entry (HV should exceed IV for edge)

histVolEstimate.description: Historical (realised) volatility estimate used to compute HV/IV ratio

volOfVolThreshold.description: Vol-of-vol proxy cap; if exceeded, IV surface too unstable for reliable scalp

ivSpreadEntryMax.description: Maximum bid-ask IV spread allowed at entry (liquidity filter)

strikeRounding.description: Strike increment for rounding ATM strike to the nearest listed option

straddlePriceCapPct.description: Straddle price must not exceed this fraction of spot (6 % cap)

portfolioAllocPct.description: Fraction of portfolio NAV allocated to pay the straddle premium (1.5 %)

portfolioNav.description: Notional portfolio size for sizing calculations ($)

maxContracts.description: Hard maximum number of straddle contracts per position

contractMultiplier.description: Shares per option contract (standard US equity = 100)

rebalanceDeltaBand.description: Re-hedge when net portfolio delta exceeds this absolute value

targetDelta.description: Target net delta after each rebalance (0.0 = delta neutral)

maxHedgeSizePct.description: Maximum single delta-hedge trade size as a fraction of underlying notional

thetaMaxDailyLoss.description: Exit if daily theta bleed exceeds this fraction of the initial premium paid

vegaExitMultiple.description: Take profit on IV expansion: exit if current IV > entry IV × this value

vegaStopMultiple.description: Stop-loss on IV contraction: exit if current IV < entry IV × this value

scalpProfitMultiple.description: Exit when cumulative scalp P&L exceeds initial premium × this multiple

maxHoldDays.description: Maximum days to hold the straddle regardless of P&L outcome

dteCloseMin.description: Exit unconditionally when estimated DTE drops below this value

gammaOppScoreMin.description: Minimum composite gamma opportunity score (0–1) required to enter

gammaIvDispWeight.description: Weight of IV-vs-HV dispersion component in gamma opportunity score

gammaAtmWeight.description: Weight of ATM-proximity component in the gamma opportunity score
